Title: Breakpoint
Description:
TECHNICAL:

Debug breakpoint for scripted brushes. Should be used with the Debug node with the 'Enable Breakpoints' checkbox checked.

Gives information about the state of the scripted brush when reached.

Options.Description:
Print a message when breakpoint is reached.

This will be shown in the 'Output Target' from the Debug node.
Options.Label: Print Message

Options.Description:
Print brush state when breakpoint is reached.

This will be shown in the 'Output Target' from the Debug node.
Options.Label: Print State

Options.Description:
Enter step-through mode (use /sb step to continue).

Starting from this node, this allows you to use each node after it one at a time. To do the next node, write '/sb step' in the 'Output Target' from the Debug node.
Options.Label: Enter Step Mode

Outputs.Description: The comparison condition to activate this Breakpoint node.
Outputs.Label: Condition
